Witherhoard.desc: Projectiles fired by this weapon blight the target or nearby area on impact.

Traveler's Chosen.desc:
Final blows with this weapon grant stacks of Gathering Light.
[Alternate Weapon Action]  : Consume stacks, granting melee, grenade, and class ability energy based on the number of stacks.

Ruinous Effigy.desc: Final blows with this weapon collapse victims into Void Transmutation spheres.

Mask of Bakris.desc: While you have a Stasis or Arc Super equipped, your Dodge becomes a longer range, faster moving shift that partially cloaks you during use. After shifting, your Stasis and Arc weapons gain a stacking damage bonus for a short time. Final blows with this bonus active refund class ability energy.

Athrys's Embrace.desc:
Weighted Knife gains a second bounce. Rapid precision hits with your weapons grant Weighted Knife a significant damage bonus, bonus melee, and the ability to stun unshielded combatants for a short time.

Empowered Weighted Knife is strong against [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions.

Precious Scars.desc: Final blows from weapons with a damage type matching your Super create a burst of healing around you that grants allies restoration. After reviving or being revived, you gain an aura that provides overshields to you and nearby allies.

Icefall Mantle.desc: While you have a Stasis Super equipped, rapid Stasis final blows grant Frost Armor. You heal a small amount whenever you gain Frost Armor. Replaces your class ability with a burst of Stasis energy that freezes nearby combatants, slows nearby opponents, and grants you increased Frost Armor.

Dawn Chorus.desc: Your Daybreak projectiles ignite targets on impact. Your Scorch deals additional damage, and builds to more powerful Ignitions. Dealing damage with Scorch or Ignitions grants melee energy.

Necrotic Grip.desc:
Damaging a target with a melee inflicts potent corruption that deals increasing damage over time. Defeating targets afflicted by corruption spreads the condition.

Provides a moderate benefit to the airborne effectiveness stat of all Weapons of Sorrow.

Salvation's Grip.desc:
[Shoot]  : Hold to charge; release to fire.
This weapon's charged projectiles create a pattern of Stasis crystals on impact and freeze nearby targets.

Strong against [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions.

Eyes of Tomorrow.desc: This weapon is capable of tracking and firing at multiple targets simultaneously.

Duality.desc: Fires a pellet spread in hip-fire or a single high-damage slug while aiming.

Cloudstrike.desc: Precision final blows generate a lightning bolt at the target's location and grant a moderate amount of Bolt Charge.

The Lament.desc:
[Block]  : Hold to rev the blade.
 • Increases damage and adds [Shield-Piercing] shield piercing to all attacks.
 • Gain stacks when dealing damage with revved attacks.
 • Additional stacks increase the damage and damage resistance of heavy attacks.

No Time to Explain.desc: Precision shots and shots against combatants slowed or frozen by Stasis will return to the magazine.

Hawkmoon.desc: Final blows and precision hits with Hawkmoon grant stacks of Paracausal Charge, increasing damage versus combatants. The final round in the magazine greatly increases damage based on the number of stacks. Stowing Hawkmoon on the final round removes this bonus.

Omnioculus.desc: You gain a second Smoke Bomb charge and have damage resistance while invisible. When you make an ally invisible, they gain damage resistance while invisible and you gain melee energy.

Cuirass of the Falling Star.desc: Greatly increases your Thundercrash damage and grants you damage resistance after impact. Melee final blows while amplified grant you Super energy.

Mantle of Battle Harmony.desc: Final blows or sustained damage with weapons matching your equipped Super damage type grant you Super energy. When your Super energy is full, you instead gain a temporary bonus to weapon damage of that type. When you've exhausted your Super, matching elemental weapons' damage temporarily causes explosions around the target.

Ticuu's Divination.desc:
Hipfiring this weapon fires multiple tracking projectiles.
Targets marked by these projectiles explode upon death, or when struck by another Sacred Flame's explosion.

Dead Man's Tale.desc: Chaining precision hits grants bonus target acquisition, range, rounds reloaded, and damage against combatants. Chaining precision hits grants bonus target acquisition, range, rounds reloaded, and damage against combatants.

Star-Eater Scales.desc: You gain additional Super energy from Orbs of Power you pick up. While your Super energy is full, picking up an Orb of Power overcharges your Super, causing you to gain a burst of healing when cast and a bonus to your Super damage. At maximum overcharge, you also gain an overshield.

The Path of Burning Steps.desc: Increase the damage of Solar weapons and Solar Ignitions based on the amount of Roaring Flames stacks you have. You are harder to suspend, slow, or freeze, and when you break out, you take no damage from doing so, creating a burst of Solar energy around yourself.

Boots of the Assembler.desc: Standing in a rift creates Noble Seekers that seek out allies and heal them. Standing in an empowering rift creates Noble Seekers that grant both you and your ally a damage bonus. When a Noble Seeker finds an ally, you gain class ability energy. Increases the airborne effectiveness stat of the Hand Cannon Lumina.

Cryosthesia 77K.desc: [Alternate Weapon Action]  : Swap firing mode after a final blow to enable a charged shot.

Vex Mythoclast.desc: This weapon fires singular bolts in full auto. When the magazine is emptied, ammo is pulled from across timelines to refill it based on the number of shots landed.

Radiant Dance Machines.desc:
Moderately increases airborne effectiveness and hip fire mobility, range, and accuracy for weapons that use Primary ammo.

Final blows with Primary ammo weapons return dodge energy, which can overflow to create additional charges when full.

No Backup Plans.desc: Shotgun and melee final blows start your health regeneration. While you have a defensive buff (Void Overshield, Amplified, Restoration, Frost Armor, Woven Mail), your Shotguns and melees deal additional damage and final blows with either extend the duration of those buffs. Provides a moderate benefit to Shotgun airborne effectiveness and reload speed.

Nothing Manacles.desc: You gain an additional Scatter Grenade charge. Enables tracking for Scatter Grenade projectiles. Scatter Grenade final blows create additional Scatter Grenade projectiles.

Lorentz Driver.desc: This weapon marks targets with an automated targeting system. Final blows on marked targets generate a telemetry pattern. Collecting a telemetry pattern grants ammo to this weapon. Collecting 3 telemetry patterns without dying grants this weapon bonus damage for a long duration and refills the magazine.

Ager's Scepter.desc: Final blows with this weapon generate a slowing burst around the defeated target.

Forerunner.desc: Oversized Sidearm with extended-range, heavy-caliber rounds. Fires full auto with increased rate of fire. Deals increased precision damage to unshielded targets.

Gjallarhorn.desc: Rounds fired split into tracking micro-missiles upon detonation.

Renewal Grasps.desc: Your Duskfield grenades have a much larger effect radius. Allies inside the Duskfield gain Frost Armor and targets inside the area deal reduced damage.

Blight Ranger.desc: Guarding with your Arc Staff does not consume extra Super energy. [Super]  : Cancel Arc Staff early, temporarily increasing Arc weapon damage and creating a blinding burst. Reflected attacks increase the damage of the burst, extend your Super, and deal additional damage.

Hoarfrost-Z.desc: While you have a Stasis Super equipped, your Barricade becomes a wall of Stasis crystals that slows nearby targets when created. Standing behind this barricade will grant you and your allies increased weapon reload speed, stability, and range.

Loreley Splendor Helm.desc: While you have a Solar Super equipped, casting your Barricade or becoming critically wounded with full class ability energy creates a Sunspot at your location.

Osmiomancy Gloves.desc: Your Coldsnap grenades have an additional charge that recharges quicker on hits. The seeker spawned from Coldsnap grenades travels farther.

Secant Filaments.desc: While using a Void Super, casting an Empowering Rift will grant you Devour. Damage dealt by you and your allies from within your Empowering Rift will [Disruption] disrupt combatants. Defeating a target while Devour is active grants you class ability energy.

Edge of Concurrence.desc: Melee and projectile damage charge this weapon. When fully charged, [Alternate Weapon Action]  to enable a special ranged attack. Sustained projectile damage causes targets to become jolted.

Edge of Action.desc: Melee and projectile damage charge this weapon. When fully charged, [Alternate Weapon Action]  to enable a special projectile attack. Projectile final blows create a volatile detonation and grant Volatile Rounds.

Edge of Intent.desc: Melee and projectile damage charge this weapon. When fully charged, [Alternate Weapon Action]  to enable a special projectile attack. Projectile final blows scorch nearby targets.

Osteo Striga.desc: Fires a stream of sentient, toxic projectiles that track the targeted enemy.

Collective Obligation.desc: This weapon stores Void debuffs when damaging foes, leeching them directly when the target is suppressed, weakened, or volatile. Once charged, [Alternate Weapon Action]  to cause damage from this weapon and to apply the stored debuffs.

Dead Messenger.desc: One-shot handheld Grenade Launcher. Projectiles release a fan of three energy waves on contact with the ground. One-shot handheld Grenade Launcher. Projectiles release a fan of three energy waves on contact with the ground.

Parasite.desc: This weapon fires Hive worms which explode on impact. The size and damage of the explosion scales with the number of enemies you've defeated just before firing this weapon.

Grand Overture.desc: Heavy slug launcher that charges, then fires full auto while the trigger is held.

Caliban's Hand.desc:
Your Proximity Knife scorches targets it damages with its explosions, or ignites targets on final blow.

After throwing a Proximity Knife, you gain increased melee regeneration until the knife explodes. Gain a small amount of melee energy when your Scorch damages a target, and Ignition final blows fully refund melee energy and can overflow into an additional knife charge.

Second Chance.desc: Gain a second charge of your Shield Throw melee. Your Shield Throws now weaken targets, create a Void Breach on final blows, and become shield-piercing, stunning [Shield-Piercing] Barrier Champions and refunding a Shield Throw charge when you do. Picking up a Void Breach grants you Shield Throw energy.

Rain of Fire.desc: Air dodge reloads all of your weapons and improves the airborne effectiveness of Fusion Rifles and Linear Fusion Rifles; final blows with these weapons make you radiant. Provides a moderate benefit to the airborne effectiveness stat of Fusion Rifles and Linear Fusion Rifles.

Trespasser.desc: Reloading after defeating a target causes the next burst to be a longer, more powerful superburst.

Heartshadow.desc: Heavy attacks made with full Sword energy turn you invisible and fire exploding Void projectiles.

Gyrfalcon's Hauberk.desc: Your Void weapons gain Volatile Rounds after you emerge from being invisible. When you are invisible and defeat a combatant while using a finisher, all of your weapons gain bonus damage; you and your nearby allies gain a reserve overshield and improved class ability regeneration. These reserve overshields can be deployed by using a class ability.

Point-Contact Cannon Brace.desc: Defeating targets with your Thunderclap melee restores melee energy. Targets near you when you use your Thunderclap suffer lightning strikes and become jolted; being amplified increases the damage of these lightning strikes.

Fallen Sunstar.desc: Ionic traces you create move faster and grant you additional ability energy. Nearby allies also gain ability energy when you collect an ionic trace.

Delicate Tomb.desc:
Fires a wide horizontal spread when shot from the hip.
Final blows with this weapon have a chance to generate Ionic Traces. Powerful foes and opposing Guardians always generate Ionic Traces.

Quicksilver Storm.desc: Landing multiple hits turns your next shot into a homing micro-missile.

Touch of Malice.desc: The final round in the magazine deals bonus damage, drawing from the wielder's life force, and then regenerates itself. Defeating powerful combatants or multiple targets rapidly restores health.

Cyrtarachne's Facade.desc: Activating Grapple grants Woven Mail. While active, Woven Mail provides flinch resistance and health when defeating targets.

Abeyant Leap.desc: Improves Drengr's Lash and spawns additional projectiles. These projectiles track targets more aggressively, travel farther, and suspend stronger. Gain Woven Mail when you suspend a target.

Swarmers.desc: Destroying a Tangle spawns a Threadling. Your Threadlings unravel targets that they damage.

Verglas Curve.desc: Final blows with this weapon grant Stasis arrows. Your next hip-fire shot will fire all of them in a single volley.

Vexcalibur.desc: Fires a spread. Equipped with a quick-draining shield. Blocking damage with your shield gradually bestows Void overshields to yourself and nearby allies. Fires a spread. Equipped with a quick-draining shield. Blocking damage with your shield gradually bestows Void overshields to yourself and nearby allies.

Winterbite.desc: Fires a large ball of energy that locks onto nearby targets and freezes them. Strong against [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions.

Deterministic Chaos.desc: Strong against [Shield-Piercing] Barrier Champions. While holding down the trigger, every fourth Heavy Metal projectile also weakenstargets on impact. Releasing the trigger after a Vexadecimal projectile partially reloads this weapon's magazine from reserves.

Conditional Finality.desc: Dual barrels split into Stasis and Solar damage. Strong against [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions.

Final Warning.desc: Holding down the trigger marks targets within range and loads multiple bullets, which fire in a burst with increased stability on trigger release. Hitting a marked target with a fully charged burst will unravel them.

Young Ahamkara's Spine.desc: Increases Tripmine Grenade duration and blast radius. Ability damage grants Tripmine Grenade energy.

Mechaneer's Tricksleeves.desc: Increases Sidearm airborne effectiveness, ready speed, and reload speed. While you're critically wounded, swapping to a Sidearm reloads it and increases its damage. While this effect is active, Sidearm final blows reload the weapon and extend the effect's duration.

Raiden Flux.desc: Quick successive attacks with Arc Staff increase its damage output, duration and jolt targets hit.

Lucky Raspberry.desc: Arcbolt Grenades have increased chaining capabilities and jolt targets hit. Damaging combatants with jolt or applying jolt to targets grants additional Arcbolt Grenade energy.

The Dragon's Shadow.desc: Your weapons ready quicker and are more stable. Dodging temporarily increases this benefit, reloads your equipped weapon from reserves, grants improved movement speed, and increases your class ability stat.

Knucklehead Radar.desc: Provides radar while you're aiming. Enhances your radar resolution while crouched. Visually marks targets. Deals more damage to low-health marked targets. Provides a small benefit to the airborne effectiveness stat of all weapons.

Celestial Nighthawk.desc: Precision final blows reduce the cooldown of your Super. Modifies Golden Gun to fire a single, high-damage shot. Targets defeated by that shot give you Super energy and explode.

Foetracer.desc: Damaging a powerful combatant or Guardian with an ability temporarily increases weapon damage of the same type. Defeating that marked target with damage that matches the element creates an Elemental pickup.

Lucky Pants.desc: Improves sprint, slide, and airborne effectiveness while a Hand Cannon is equipped. For a short time after being drawn, Hand Cannons ready faster, are more accurate, and each hit against a combatant increases Hand Cannon damage.

Orpheus Rig.desc: Provides ability energy for each target tethered by Deadfall anchors. Moebius Quiver has an additional shot.

St0mp-EE5.desc: Increases slide distance and improves High Jump, Strafe Jump, and Triple Jump. Take less damage from targets when airborne.

ACD/0 Feedback Fence.desc: Melee hits grant Armor Charge, and you take less melee damage from combatants while you have Armor Charge. Taking melee damage causes you to emit a burst of damaging Arc energy that jolts targets, consuming your Armor Charge and dealing more damage based on the number of stacks consumed.

Doom Fang Pauldron.desc:
Defeating targets with Void damage has a chance to grant an escalating bonus to damage with Void weapons. Defeating targets with Void melee grants Super energy.

While Sentinel Shield is active, defeating targets with melee attacks recharges Shield Throw, which extends your Super on hitting a target.

Synthoceps.desc: When you're surrounded, gain increased melee and Super damage, as well as improved weapon handling and reload speed.

Crest of Alpha Lupi.desc: Generates an additional Orb of Power from Supers. Generating a Barricade, or dealing sustained damage or defeating targets from behind one creates a healing pulse. Healing your allies grants Barricade energy.

Actium War Rig.desc: Steadily reloads a portion of your equipped Auto Rifle or Machine Gun's magazine from reserves. Final blows with Auto Rifles or Machine Guns boost their stability, ammo generation, and damage. Provides a moderate benefit to their airborne effectiveness.

Hallowfire Heart.desc:
While your Solar Super is charged, ability final blows cure you and give stacks of Sunfire Furnace.

While Sunfire Furnace is active, grenade and Shieldburst final blows trigger an ignition. Each stack increases grenade regeneration, class ability regeneration, and Super damage. Upon exiting your Super, all stacks are converted into Super energy.

An Insurmountable Skullfort.desc: Final blows with Arc melees trigger health regeneration and fully restore a melee charge. Melee hits grant Arc melee energy.

Mask of the Quiet One.desc: Grants ability energy when you are damaged. While you have a Void super equipped, rapid final blows and final blows while critically wounded grant Devour.

Lion Rampant.desc: Increases hip-fire range and accuracy for Primary ammo weapons. Grants additional aerial maneuverability and enables airborne firing during Lift. Increases the airborne effectiveness stat of all weapons.

Peacekeepers.desc: While wielding a Submachine Gun, handling, airborne effectiveness, and movement are all improved, and damage against combatants will increase the longer you remain on target. Submachine Guns are reloaded when stowed.

Dunemarchers.desc: Increases sprint speed. Sprinting builds up a static charge. After melee-attacking a combatant, that charge will chain damage to nearby foes. Gain Bolt Charge per target hit by the chain.

Sunbracers.desc: Increases the duration of Solar Grenades. Solar melee kills grant unlimited Solar Grenade energy for a brief time.

Karnstein Armlets.desc: Melee and finisher final blows instantly grant cure and provide restoration for a short duration.

Winter's Guile.desc: Melee and finisher final blows increase melee damage. With maximum stacks, you gain vastly increased melee regeneration speed for a short time.

Starfire Protocol.desc: Fusion Grenades have an additional charge and recharge from empowered weapon damage, with empowered weapon final blows granting more energy. Defeating targets with Fusion Grenades grant Rift energy.

Wings of Sacred Dawn.desc: While you have a [Solar]Solar Super equipped, aiming weapons while you're midair suspends you there for a short time. While this effect is active, you are more resistant to incoming damage and combatants are less accurate. Weapon hits extend this effect's duration, and [Solar]Solar weapon final blows provide Restoration and reload your other weapons from reserves. Provides a large benefit to the a

Skull of Dire Ahamkara.desc:
After casting a Nova Bomb, briefly gain a free cast of a fast-moving but weaker Nova Bomb: Lance. Your Nova Bomb: Cataclysm is empowered if detonated with another Nova Bomb. 
Nova Bomb final blows and weapon final blows while you have Devour grant Super energy.

Crown of Tempests.desc:
While you have an Arc ability equipped, Arc ability or Jolt final blows increase the recharge rate of your abilities and extend the duration of Stormtrance.

While you have Conduction Tines, Ionic Sentry creates a Storm Grenade when it deploys.

Eye of Another World.desc: Highlights priority targets and improves the regeneration speed of your grenade, melee, and Rift abilities. Provides a small benefit to the airborne effectiveness stat of all weapons.

Nezarec's Sin.desc: Void final blows increase ability energy recharge rate. Combatants affected by Soul Siphon are suppressed. Defeating suppressed targets grants more time to Abyssal Extractors.

Transversive Steps.desc: Sprint speed increased. After a short time sprinting, your currently equipped weapon is automatically reloaded.

Lunafaction Boots.desc: Increases hip-fire range and accuracy for Primary ammo weapons. Your Rifts gain the additional ability to increase weapon reload speeds. Empowering Rift makes weapons effective at longer ranges.

Coldheart.desc: This weapon shoots a steady cold-fusion-powered Arc laser, dealing more damage the longer it remains on a target.

Sweet Business.desc: Larger magazine. Increased accuracy when firing from the hip. Picking up Special or Heavy ammo immediately reloads this weapon.

Merciless.desc: Hits with projectiles decrease this weapon's charge time for a short duration.

Fighting Lion.desc:
Grenade projectiles will bounce off surfaces.
[Shoot]  : Fire; release to detonate.

The Prospector.desc: Grenades spawn cluster bombs upon detonation. Defeating targets creates Arc explosions.

Sturm.desc: Final blows with this weapon fill the magazine of the equipped Energy weapon from reserves.

Sunshot.desc: This weapon fires explosive rounds and highlights targets that take damage from Sunshot.

Vigilance Wing.desc: This weapon fires a 5-round burst. When a nearby ally is killed, gain health regeneration and increased movement speed.

Graviton Lance.desc: Second shot of a burst rips a hole through space-time, doing high damage and recoil with no falloff.

The Wardcliff Coil.desc: This weapon fires a volley of rockets and grants Bolt Charge to all nearby allies for every other rocket that it fires.

Skyburner's Oath.desc: This weapon lobs explosive slugs. When you're aiming down sights, the slugs travel fast and straight. When you're firing from the hip, the explosion is larger and applies Scorch to the target.

Tractor Cannon.desc: This weapon emits a powerful impulse that pushes targets away, suppressing their abilities and dramatically weakening them. Strong against [Disruption] Overload Champions.

Legend of Acrius.desc: This weapon fires blasts of high-damage Arc energy that overpenetrates enemies.

Rat King.desc: This fully automatic weapon becomes stronger when nearby allies also have it equipped. Stacks up to 6 times.

Borealis.desc: [Alternate Weapon Action]  : Changes this weapon's damage type, cycling between Void, Arc, and Solar. Grants this weapon temporarily increased damage when you apply or gain an elemental buff or debuff that matches this weapon's damage type.

D.A.R.C.I..desc:
Aim at a target to view their health and other critical information in the scope.
Jolts targets when dealing damage. Strong against [Disruption] Overload Champions.

Riskrunner.desc: When taking Arc Damage, this weapon becomes more powerful and resists incoming Arc Damage. Kills extend the time in this overcharged state.

Hard Light.desc: Rounds fired from this weapon have reduced damage falloff, overpenetrate targets, and ricochet off hard surfaces. Projectile damage increases after bounce.

MIDA Multi-Tool.desc: This weapon boosts movement speed. Radar stays active while aiming down sights.

Gemini Jester.desc: Dodging disorients nearby enemies and temporarily removes their radar.

Shinobu's Vow.desc: Gain an additional Skip Grenade charge. Skip Grenade damage grants Bolt Chargeand gaining Bolt Charge grants Skip Grenade energy. When Bolt Charge is ready, you heal nearby allies and enhance your next Skip Grenade.

Graviton Forfeit.desc: Increases the duration of any invisibility effects. When you gain invisibility, your grenade, melee and class abilities recharge faster. At maximum stacks, you gain a Void Overshield as well.

Khepri's Horn.desc: Solar final blows recharge your Barricade. While you have a Solar Super equipped, casting your Barricade unleashes waves of Solar energy that damage and scorch targets. Combatants damaged and Guardians defeated by these waves are enveloped in a Sunspot.

Helm of Saint-14.desc:
Weapons of Light persists after exiting Ward of Dawn. While Weapons of Light is active, final blows or sustained damage grant stacks of The Saint; Void and Kinetic damage sources also trigger a suppressing burst.
 
Picking up Ward of Dawn consumes all stacks of The Saint and extends its duration based on how many stacks were consumed.

Mk. 44 Stand Asides.desc: While your Juggernaut shield is active, you slowly gain Bolt Charge stacks over time and increased weapon ready speed. Sprinting while amplified creates an energizing field behind you that grants close by allies speed boost.

Vesper of Radius.desc: Rifts periodically release Arc shockwaves. Final blows with these shockwaves create an Arc explosion. While an Arc Super is equipped, the shockwaves and subsequent explosions blind nearby targets. Rift energy recharges faster when you are surrounded by targets.

Ophidian Aspect.desc: Improves melee range as well as ready speed and reload for weapons. Provides a small benefit to airborne effectiveness for all weapons.

The Stag.desc: Your Rift provides damage reduction to allied Guardians standing in it. Grants Rift energy when you are critically wounded. On your death, creates a healing rift on your corpse.

Prometheus Lens.desc: Fires a Solar trace beam that creates a field of heat energy that grows as the weapon is fired. Sustained damage applies scorch to the target.

The Colony.desc: This weapon's grenades are insectoid robots that chase targets and explode close to them. Consumes tougher combatants to create additional robots.

Telesto.desc: Fusion projectiles attach and detonate with a delayed Void blast.

The Jade Rabbit.desc: Chain precision shots or land precision final blows to refill the magazine, improve stability, and greatly increase the damage of Firefly and body shots. Landing a body shot will remove one stack of the damage bonus.

Ophidia Spathe.desc: Gain a second knife per charge. Getting a final blow with a throwing knife grants consecutive knives a temporary stacking damage bonus. Gambler's Dodge refreshes the bonus timer.

Wormhusk Crown.desc: Activating your class ability grants Cure. Rapid [Solar]Solar final blows grant stacks of Burning Souls that increase Solar ability damage, increase the potency of Dodge's healing, and spreads the healing to nearby allies.

Sealed Ahamkara Grasps.desc: Powered melee and finisher final blows grant Nightmare Fuel, increasing handling and airborne effectiveness. While active, freshly drawn weapons deal additional damage and grant Nightmare Fuel on final blows. Gaining Nightmare Fuel reloads all holstered weapons.

Fr0st-EE5.desc:
Increases grenade, melee, and dodge regeneration while sprinting.

Gain stacks of Frost Armor while sprinting. When you have Frost Armor, Stasis weapons deal additional damage.

Ashen Wake.desc: Fusion Grenades gain increased throw speed, explode on impact, and stun Unstoppable Champions. Final blows with Fusion Grenades grant grenade energy.

Wormgod Caress.desc: Defeating a target with melee or a finisher grants escalating melee damage, which decays over time. Higher levels of Burning Fists grant increased weapon damage.

Armamentarium.desc: Gain an additional grenade charge. Grenade final blows spawn an Orb of Power. Weapon final blows grant grenade energy. Activating your grenade ability reloads your equipped weapon from reserves.

Eternal Warrior.desc: [Arc]Arc final blows grant an escalating damage bonus with Arc weapons. While using Fist of Havoc, activating your Super grants an overshield; final blows extend its duration. When it ends, gain a damage bonus to your Arc weapons.

Sanguine Alchemy.desc: While standing in any rift, damaging a target will mark it. You deal extra damage to marked targets, and gain additional bonus damage with weapons that have a damage type matching your equipped Super. Weapon final blows while standing in any rift pause the rift's countdown, extending its duration.

Verity's Brow.desc: Weapon final blows with a damage type matching your grenade grant Death Throes, which provide a grenade damage bonus and grant you grenade energy. When you have Death Throes and throw a grenade, nearby allies gain greatly increased grenade regeneration for a short time.

Claws of Ahamkara.desc: Gain an additional melee charge. Powered melee final blows spawn an Orb of Power.

Apotheosis Veil.desc: Immediately regenerate health, melee, grenade, and Rift energy for you and your nearby allies upon activating your Super. After your Super ends, temporarily gain greatly increased melee and grenade regen.

Polaris Lance.desc: Precision hits return ammo to the mag. Landing 4 precision hits loads a delayed Solar explosive round that scorches targets for your next shot.

The Huckleberry.desc: Increases rate of fire and recoil while you're holding down the trigger. Final blows dealt with this weapon reload the magazine.

Worldline Zero.desc: [Heavy Attack]  : Use while sprinting with full energy to launch a heavy blink attack. Defeating a target with this attack allows it to be immediately used again.

SUROS Regime.desc: The bottom half of each magazine deals bonus damage and has a chance to return health on kill.

Sleeper Simulant.desc: The weapon's laser overpenetrates enemies and refracts off hard surfaces.

Whisper of the Worm.desc: Higher base precision damage. Rapidly landing three precision hits will refill the magazine. Higher base precision damage. Rapidly landing three precision hits will refill the magazine.

Shards of Galanor.desc: Throwing Knife final blows decrease the cooldown of your Super. Hitting a single target with most Blade Barrage knives in a volley causes them to release a violent Solar explosion; releasing scorching Solar shrapnel. Hits and final blows with Blade Barrage will return Super energy after the Super ends.

Oathkeeper.desc: Bow perfect draw can be held indefinitely. Gain a bonus to the Bow's damage when released, based on how long perfect draw was held. Provides a moderate benefit to the airborne effectiveness stat of Bows.

The Sixth Coyote.desc: Gain a second dodge charge. Shortly after dodging, your next weapon final blow spawns an Orb of Power.

Gwisin Vest.desc:
Each Spectral Blades hit or final blow you make before becoming invisible will restore more of your Super energy.

Exiting invisibility while near a target creates a cloud of weakening smoke around you.

Ursa Furiosa.desc: Move faster while guarding with Sentinel Shield or the Unbreakable shield. Damage blocked with Sentinel Shield is converted to Super energy, and damage blocked with Unbreakable is converted to grenade energy.

Heart of Inmost Light.desc: Using an ability (grenade, melee, or Barricade) empowers the other two abilities. Empowered means abilities have faster regen, melees and grenades do more damage, and Barricades have more hit points.

One-Eyed Mask.desc: Highlights the target who dares to damage you. Track down and destroy them for an overshield.

Antaeus Wards.desc: While sliding with full class ability energy, you gain a frontal shield that reflects incoming damage. After reflecting damage, your class ability energy is depleted based on the amount of damage reflected.

Contraverse Hold.desc: Resist incoming damage while charging your Void grenade with Chaos Accelerant. Charged Void grenades return grenade energy on a hit and apply Weaken.

Chromatic Fire.desc:
Final blows from Kinetic weapons create an explosion in the element of your equipped Super that deals damage and applies a matching elemental effect:
• [Arc] Blinds targets.
• [Solar] Scorches targets.
• [Void] Weakens targets.
• [Stasis] Slows targets.
• [Strand] Severs targets.
Elemental final blows temporarily increase the explosion's size. Precision final blows always maximum the explosion's s

Phoenix Protocol.desc: Kills and assists you make while standing in your Well of Radiance return Super energy.

Geomag Stabilizers.desc: Damaging targets with Chaos Reach extends its duration. Collecting Ionic Traces grants you energy for Chaos Reach. Sprinting while near max Bolt Charge will grant stacks over time.

Cerberus+1.desc: Shoots erratic bullets from all gun barrels at the same time.

Wish-Ender.desc: While aiming down sights with a fully drawn Bow, combatants behind walls are highlighted and arrows pierce shields. Strong against [Shield-Piercing] Barrier Champions.

Trinity Ghoul.desc: Fires an arrow that splits when released. Aiming down sights and fully drawing the bow both decrease the spread.

One Thousand Voices.desc: Charging this weapon unleashes a giant continuous beam of death.

Malfeasance.desc: Shoot tainted slugs that burrow into combatants. Stacking enough slugs causes them all to explode, stunning surviving combatants. Strong against  [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions.

Two-Tailed Fox.desc: Shoots two rockets, one Void and one Solar, that can track onto the same target. Strong against [Disruption] Overload Champions.

Black Talon.desc: [Heavy Attack]  : Fire a Heavy projectile attack that suppresses targets. Hitting a target already suppressed spreads the effect to nearby targets.

Wavesplitter.desc: Laser damage has three power levels that oscillate while the trigger is held down.

Ace of Spades.desc: Reloading after a kill loads magazine with a few extra-damage bullets. Grants radar while aiming down sights.

The Queenbreaker.desc: [Alternate Weapon Action]  to swap between scopes and alter this weapon's firing behavior. Strong against [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions.

Lord of Wolves.desc: Fires a powerful short-range burst of Solar damage.

Thunderlord.desc: Final blows with this weapon generate stunning lighting strikes from above. Lightning strikes grant a stack of Bolt Charge. Strong against [Disruption] Overload Champions.

Le Monarque.desc: Arrows fired while perfectly drawn become poison arrows. Precision hits with poison arrows stun the combatant and spread poison to nearby ones. Strong against [Disruption] Overload Champions.

Anarchy.desc: Grenades stick to surfaces and chain Arc bolts to other mines.

Jötunn.desc: Hold down the trigger to charge up a tracking shot that explodes and burns on impact.

Izanagi's Burden.desc: [Alternate Weapon Action]  : Consume the magazine and load a round with additional range and damage.

The Last Word.desc: This weapon fires full auto. Hip-fire shots deal bonus precision damage while increasing reload speed and accuracy.

Liar's Handshake.desc: Using your Arc melee ability or being hit by a melee attack will allow you to follow up with an extremely powerful melee counterpunch that will heal you.

Stronghold.desc: Maximizes guard stats on equipped Heavy ammo Swords. You take reduced damage while blocking with a Sword. Rapidly damaging targets after blocking shots with a Sword grants Restoration for a duration determined by the number of shots blocked.

Getaway Artist.desc: [Grenade]  : Convert your Arc grenade into a Arc Soul and become amplified. The Arc Soul functions as an autonomous turret.

Arbalest.desc: Fires slugs that cause massive damage to combatant shields. Strong against [Shield-Piercing] Barrier Champions.

Thorn.desc: Rounds pierce targets and inflict corruption. Final blows with this weapon leave behind Remnants.

Outbreak Perfected.desc: This weapon creates SIVA nanite swarms on rapid hits and precision kills. This weapon creates SIVA nanite swarms on rapid hits and precision kills.

Khepri's Sting.desc: Defeating a weakened target releases a burst of weakening smoke and refunds Void melee ability energy.

Peregrine Greaves.desc: All shoulder charge abilities (Seismic Strike, Hammer Strike, or Shield Bash) deal bonus damage when activated in the air. Damaging mini-bosses, Tormentors, or Champions with your shoulder charge refunds your melee. Provides a small benefit to the airborne effectiveness stat of all weapons.

Astrocyte Verse.desc:
With Blink equipped, use [Air Dodge]  while airborne to perform a Dark Blink.

Using Blink or Dark Blink grants Volatile Rounds. Blink travels farther, causes nearby targets to become volatile, and has a shorter cooldown. While your Nova Warp Super is active, Dark Blink does not cost Super energy. Provides a moderate benefit to airborne effectiveness for all weapons.

Lumina.desc: Kills with this weapon leave behind Remnants. Absorbing a Remnant converts your next hipfired shot into an ally-seeking Noble Round and partially refills the magazine.

Tarrabah.desc:
This weapon stores power when dealing or receiving damage; defeating combatants or dealing damage to Scorched combatants grants increased progress.
[Alternate Weapon Action]  : Unleashes the beast when full, increasing outgoing damage and reducing incoming Solar damage.

Bad Juju.desc: Kills refill the magazine, increase damage for a short duration, and grant Super energy based on the strength of String of Curses. Fires full-auto.

Truth.desc: This weapon's rockets have tracking. Lock onto targets when aiming down sights. Landing hits with a full magazine grants ammo and boosts the next magazine with increased tracking strength, stability, fire rate, and cluster bombs.

Assassin's Cowl.desc: Powered melee final blows grant invisibility and restore a portion of health and shields. Finishers and final blows against more powerful targets increase the duration of the invisibility and the amount of health and shields restored.

Phoenix Cradle.desc: Sol Invictus lasts twice as long. Allies who pass through your Sunspot are granted Sol Invictus and Restoration. Dealing sustained [Solar]Solar damage in a Sunspot extends the duration of the Sunspot. Applying Solar buffs to allies has a chance to create a Sunspot at your feet.

Stormdancer's Brace.desc: Stormtrance hits and final blows increase the damage it deals. Refunds Super energy when it ends. While Stormtrance is equipped, ability damage while amplified grants Bolt Charge.

Leviathan's Breath.desc: Fires a massive heavy bolt that stuns unshielded combatants. Strong against [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions.

Eriana's Vow.desc: This weapon fires shield-piercing ammunition and comes with a scope. Strong against [Shield-Piercing] Barrier Champions. Breaking a matched shield or piercing a Champion's barrier will cause the target to ignite.

Deathbringer.desc:
Fires remotely detonated projectiles that drop Void orbs on combatants.
[Shoot]  : Fire; release to detonate.

Divinity.desc: Sustained damage with this weapon envelops the target in a field that weakens and stuns them. Strong against [Disruption] Overload Champions.

Monte Carlo.desc: Dealing damage with this weapon reduces your melee cooldown and grants a chance to fully charge your melee ability with each kill.

The Bombardiers.desc:
Dodging leaves behind an explosive that detonates after a short delay, damaging targets around it and creating a secondary effect based on your Super's element:
• [Arc] Blinds targets.
• [Solar] Scorches targets.
• [Void] Suppresses targets.
• [Stasis] Slows targets.
• [Strand] Severs targets.

Severance Enclosure.desc: Powered melee final blows unleash a damaging explosion. Finishers and final blows against more powerful targets increase the radius and damage of the explosion.

Promethium Spur.desc: While a Solar Super is equipped, weapon final blows grant class ability energy. Defeating targets with your weapon while standing in a healing rift creates a pulse that grants Radiant to you and nearby allies; an empowering rift instead grants Cure to you and nearby allies. Daybreak final blows grant both effects.

Bastion.desc:
Rapidly fires 3 spreads of pure force.

After a successful melee hit, this weapon gains increased damage, reduced charge time, and improved reload speed for a short duration. Hitting a target with most of the pellets in a burst increases melee damage for a short duration.

Symmetry.desc:
This weapon fires full auto.
[Alternate Weapon Action]  : Swap to Arc Seeker mode. Arc Seekers track toward combatants you target.

Devil's Ruin.desc: Final blows create Firesprites. After picking up a Firesprite, [Alternate Weapon Action]  to enable a high-powered Solar laser beam mode. Strong against [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions.

Raiju's Harness.desc: Activating Gathering Storm calls down lightning on all nearby targets, jolting them while also amplifying allies. Defeating Arc debuffed targets grants a small amount of Gathering Storm energy.

Citan's Ramparts.desc: You and allies can shoot through your Towering Barricade. Your Towering Barricade takes increased damage from Guardians.

Felwinter's Helm.desc: Powered melee hits weaken targets. Powered melee final blows create a burst of energy that dramatically weakens nearby targets. Finishers and final blows against more powerful targets increase the radius of the burst and the length of the weakening effect.

Tommy's Matchbook.desc: Sustained fire with this weapon overheats it, increasing damage but burning the user.

Heir Apparent.desc: [Aim Down Sights]  : Spins up this weapon. This weapon can be fired only when fully spun up.

The Fourth Horseman.desc: This weapon's rate of fire is increased significantly, and fires full auto. Final blows auto load ammo from reserves. Powerful targets fully reload the weapon.

Cadmus Ridge Lancecap.desc: While a Stasis Super is equipped, rapid Stasis weapon damage or damage from behind your Rally Barricade will create a Diamond Lance near you. Thrown Diamond Lances create Stasis crystals. Your Diamond Lances deal more damage based on how much Frost Armor you have.

Ballidorse Wrathweavers.desc: Targets frozen by your Winter's Wrath Super take increased Shatter damage. Allies in range of your Winter's Wrath shockwave and Frostpulse gain Frost Armor and deal increased damage with Stasis weapons. Granting these buffs to allies grants you Super energy.

Speedloader Slacks.desc: Dodging instantly reloads all your weapons and grants increased reload and handling to you and nearby allies. While the buff is active, additional dodges increase the buff strength and refresh the timer, maxing out at 5 stacks. Dealing sustained damage grants class ability energy.

Revision Zero.desc: This weapon fires special shield-piercing ammunition and is strong against [Shield-Piercing] Barrier Champions. Precision hits grant targeting data. [Alternate Weapon Action]  to swap to the alternate scope, loading high-damage rounds based on the amount of targeting data. High damage rounds create shockwaves around impacted targets, exhausting them. This weapon fires special shield-piercing ammun

Hierarchy of Needs.desc: Precision hits and final blows build Guidance Ring energy. Opposing Guardians grant additional energy. At full charge, hip firing creates a Guidance Ring.

The Manticore.desc:
Dealing damage while grounded charges antigrav repulsors. Dealing damage while airborne extends antigrav repulsors.
[Alternate Weapon Action]  to disengage antigrav repulsors.

Triton Vice.desc: Increases Glaive reload speed and melee damage when surrounded. Glaive melee final blows overflow a round to the magazine. Glaive projectile final blows detonate in an explosion.

Cenotaph Mask.desc: Steadily reloads a portion of your equipped Trace Rifle's magazine from reserves. Damaging a vehicle, boss, or Champion with a Trace Rifle marks them as the target. When an ally defeats the marked target, Special ammo is generated for you and Heavy ammo for your allies.

Arbor Warden.desc: Using your class ability channels defensive Light inward, providing a grenade that creates a barricade on impact. Picking up Orbs of Power enhances your next Barri-nade, spawning more barricades on impact.

Centrifuse.desc: Sprinting, sliding, and firing this weapon builds a temporary electrostatic charge, increasing range and reload speed. Final blows with high charge cause explosions, and maximum charge explosions blind targets.

Wicked Implement.desc: Rapidly landing precision hits causes targets to become slowed. Strong against [Disruption] Overload Champions.

The Navigator.desc: Firing this weapon at an ally grants Woven Mail to both the user and the target. Deals more damage while you have Woven Mail.

Mothkeeper's Wraps.desc:
Defeat targets to charge up cages of loyal moths that fly toward nearby targets or allies.
 
[Grenade]  : Throw the cage of loyal moths, which are released on impact. Upon reaching targets, moths detonate in a blinding explosion; upon reaching allies, moths provide a Void overshield.

Pyrogale Gauntlets.desc: Modifies Burning Maul into a single, high-damage slam of your hammer that creates several cyclones of flame. Consecration's second slam creates a cyclone of flame.

Briarbinds.desc: Your Void Souls have a longer duration. They also gain escalating damage and durability as they defeat targets. You can retrieve your Void Souls by interacting with them, allowing them to be redeployed.

Tessellation.desc: This [weapon|instrument|topology] adapts its damage type to match your equipped grenade. Final blows grant grenade and Transcendence energy.

Ex Diris.desc: This weapon enrages when dealing or taking sustained damage, gaining increased rate of fire while enraged.

Necrochasm.desc: Precision final blows with this weapon increase reload speed and trigger a Cursed Thrall explosion that inflicts corruption. Final blows with Cursed Thrall explosions refill the magazine.

Wish-Keeper.desc: Precision hits and final blows build energy towards a Snareweaver arrow that can be fired from the hip. On impact, Snareweaver arrows create a pattern of traps that suspend nearby targets. Precision hits and final blows build energy towards a Snareweaver arrow that can be fired from the hip. On impact, Snareweaver arrows create a pattern of traps that suspend nearby targets.

Buried Bloodline.desc: Double fires tracking bolts. Landing bolts leeches health from the target.

Dragon's Breath.desc: Rockets embed themselves in struck targets and periodically eject incendiary fuel that inflicts Scorch. The longer this weapon goes without firing, the more fuel the next rocket contains. Strong against [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions.

Mataiodoxía.desc: Targets damaged by Arcane Needle emit a suspending detonation when defeated. Landing multiple Arcane Needles or Needlestorm on the same target immediately triggers a larger, more powerful detonation. Defeating suspended targets grants melee energy. Your Arcane Needles are strong against [Shield-Piercing]Barrier Champions.

Speaker's Sight.desc: Healing grenades spawn a Restorative Turret. Healing allies occasionally spawns an Orb of Power.

Solipsism.desc: Damaging a target with a melee inflicts potent corruption. Defeating targets afflicted by corruption spreads the condition. Destroying a Tangle spawns Threadlings.

Wishful Ignorance.desc: Gain an additional Frenzied Blade charge. Frenzied Blade and Flechette Storm briefly increase their damage with each strike. Pulses from your Banner of War return melee energy based on the number of allies healed.

Hazardous Propulsion.desc: Weapon precision hits or final blows have a chance to load a Kinetic Exodus micro-missile. Activating your class ability fires loaded Exodus micro-missiles. Damaging targets with Exodus micro-missiles temporarily increases the damage you deal with other micro-missiles and Rocket Launchers.

Stoicism.desc: Powered melee or finisher final blows unleash a damaging explosion. Damaging a target with a powered melee causes all nearby targets to suffer lightning strikes and become jolted.

Balance of Power.desc: Your Threaded Specter has increased duration and durability, and damaging it releases additional Threadlings. While near your Threaded Specter, you do not appear on radar.

Gifted Conviction.desc: Activating Ascension or Tempest Strike throws bouncing explosives at nearby targets that jolt and damage them. Jolting nearby targets grants you damage resistance.

Relativism.desc: Your weapons ready quicker and are more stable. Using your class ability temporarily increases this benefit and reloads your equipped weapon from reserves. Gain Woven Mail when you use your grenade.

Choir of One.desc: Fires extended-range, heavy-caliber projectiles at a reduced rate of fire. Deals increased precision damage when aiming down sights. Fires extended-range, heavy-caliber projectiles at a reduced rate of fire. Deals increased precision damage when aiming down sights.

Still Hunt.desc: Pick up Orbs of Power or land precision hits to charge this weapon's Super bar. Once full, [Alternate Weapon Action]  to fire Golden Gun shots.

Euphony.desc: Dealing sustained damage with this weapon spawns Threadlings at your target's location.

Microcosm.desc: Fires a beam of Kinetic light, dealing massive bonus damage to shields.

Ergo Sum.desc:
Final blows with this weapon grant stacks of Gathering Light, improving guard stats and lunge range.
Stowing this weapon consumes all stacks, granting melee, grenade, and class ability energy. Final blows with this weapon grant stacks of Gathering Light, improving guard stats and lunge range.
Stowing this weapon consumes all stacks, granting melee, grenade, and class ability energy. Heavy attack d

Khvostov 7G-0X.desc: Every seventh bullet from this weapon ricochets to nearby targets.

Red Death Reformed.desc: Final blows with this weapon cure you and increase reload speed; reloading after final blows cures nearby allies.

Mask of Fealty.desc: Withering Blade hits and bounces create a small Stasis crystal and refund a portion of melee energy. Using Withering Blade to shatter crystals or frozen targets releases a spread of Withering Blades.

Blastwave Striders.desc: Gain resistance to your explosives. Defeat targets to charge this armor. Once charged, land a Shiver Strike melee attack or deal explosive self-damage to rocket jump backward and release a blast wave with deadly shrapnel projectiles. The wave freezes combatants and slows Guardians. Charged rocket jumps grant Frost Armor.

Rime-coat Raiment.desc: Your Bleak Watcher turrets are enhanced with extended range and are surrounded by Stasis crystals and a storm. While standing in the storm, you are granted icicles over time. Icicles activate when you fire your weapons, applying Slow to targets they hit.

Slayer's Fang.desc:
Dealing final blows to targets grants Nightsworn Sight. 

During that time, final blows grant Truesight, reload speed and precision damage is increased, and submunitions weaken targets. Dealing final blows to targets grants Nightsworn Sight. 

During that time, final blows grant Truesight, reload speed and precision damage is increased, and submunitions weaken targets.

Alethonym.desc: This weapon fires a Harvester Spike projectile. Dealing final blows with this weapon creates a single Vestige at the target's location. Impaling more powerful combatants with the projectile creates a steady stream of Vestiges from the target.

Ice Breaker.desc: Final blows or assists with any other weapon or ability have a chance to create ammo for Ice Breaker. Defeating powerful combatants will create multiple rounds.

Finality's Auger.desc: [Alternate Weapon Action]  to fire a special projectile that deploys a Ruinscribe Turret. This projectile costs 3 ammo to fire. Aim the projectile skyward to provide the clearest sight lines for the turret which will automatically shoot at nearby targets.

Barrow-Dyad.desc: This weapon generates blight as it deals damage. While not firing, blight depletes, and the magazine is gradually refilled. Reload the weapon to convert stored blight into Blighted Seekers. This weapon generates blight as it deals damage. While not firing, blight depletes, and the magazine is gradually refilled. Reload the weapon to convert stored blight into Blighted Seekers.

Lodestar.desc: This weapon fires a low-intensity Arc beam with enhanced stability and accuracy.

New Land Beyond.desc:
Scoring precision hits increases this weapon's damage until the wielder's defeat.

Massively increases ammo reserves.

Moirai.desc: Threaded Spike can bounce to Tangles, detonating them and returning immediately. Tangles detonated by Threaded Spike are rewoven and retrieved by it. Catches without a Tangle refund extra melee energy.

Melas Panoplia.desc: Collecting a Firesprite or rapid Solar final blows make you a Forge Master, allowing you to recall your Throwing Hammer. After impacting a target, recall your hammer at full intensity to perform a Perfect Recall, causing an explosion of forge slag. Perfect Recalls and collecting Firesprites extend your time as a Forge Master.

Eunoia.desc: Hellion projectiles deal increased damage the further they travel eventually fracturing into scorching shrapnel.

Fortune's Favor.desc:
After landing a final blow while at full health, or when out of combat for an extended duration, your shields will slowly recharge into an overshield. 

When you have an overshield, your weapons gain increased accuracy, stability, handling, and damage against combatants, and final blows will grant a short period of increased mobility once the overshield is depleted.

Praxic Vestment.desc:
You gain an air move jetpack. Weapon and Arc powered melee final blows build up Jetpack Fuel.

While airborne, [Air Dodge] : Charge your jetpack.

On release, activate your jetpack with a forceful blast of exhausting Arc energy then fly forward a short distance based on the amount charged. Collide with a combatant to unleash a blinding blast of energy and gain a temporary bonus to your melee stat.

Deimosuffusion.desc: While a Strand Super is equipped, casting Rift will suspend nearby combatants. Suspend deals damage over time, which heals you in the process. Targets who break free from suspension suffer additional damage. Defeating suspended targets heals you a moderate amount.
